title: The Legends of Rocks, Roger, and Oden Surface
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Roger, Oden, Unknown person #2, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #3 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: On a calm sea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A few years before

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world saw the beginning of the "Great age of Pirates"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm glad I came with you,

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What're you gettin' all stiff for, ya bastard?!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: We're the ones thankful you're here, Oden!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yer drunk off your ass, Roger! Cool it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sharrap! I don't wanna hear it from a doctor that drinks like a fish!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you need any help with anything, open?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll give ya a hand too, y'know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You'd just get in his way, dumbo.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say, Oden, if you really need anything, though...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Thank you, Rayleigh, Redtaro, Buggyjiro.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we Kozukis must attend to this ourselves.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why am I always the "-Jiro"?!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: I never understood why Wano insisted

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: on keeping its borders closed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And now that I've finally made my way out, they're calling me to come back and become shogun?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How selfish. I won't tell them,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But I'll keep the fire alive.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: With my retainers back home,

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: I'll open Wano's borders!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And together, we'll wait twenty years!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: For the future to come!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You betcha, oden!

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: You too, Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Since then,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: 25 years have passed.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Wano arc act three

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: This is Hakumai.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: HABU Harbor.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 32 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
